hero.title: Hairspray
hero.reason: In honor of World Environment Day, we're celebrating a film that brings people together across racial and social divides, Hairspray, with its uplifting message and energetic performances.
hero.blurb: This musical comedy is a fun and lively way to spend an evening, with catchy songs and impressive dance numbers. The film's themes of acceptance and inclusivity make it a great choice for World Environment Day.

released.title: Mr. & Mrs. Smith
released.reason: Released today in 2005, this action-packed comedy still thrills audiences with its witty banter and high-octane action sequences, making it a standout film in the genre.
released.blurb: This film is a non-stop adrenaline rush, with Brad Pitt and Angelina Jolie delivering memorable performances as the titular characters. The chemistry between the leads is undeniable, making their on-screen relationship a joy to watch.

birthday.title: Apollo 13
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Ron Howard's leading man, Tom Hanks, who shines in this gripping drama based on a true story, bringing to life the heroic efforts of the Apollo 13 mission.
birthday.blurb: This film is a tense and inspiring drama that showcases the incredible skills of its cast, with Tom Hanks delivering a remarkable performance. The film's attention to detail and historical accuracy make it a must-see for space enthusiasts.

awful.title: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever
awful.reason: This mind-bogglingly bad action film has gained a cult following for its absurdity and unintentional humor, making it a guilty pleasure for fans of so-bad-it's-good cinema.
awful.blurb: This film is a masterclass in how not to make an action movie, with cringe-worthy dialogue and poorly choreographed fight scenes. Despite its many flaws, the film remains entertaining in a trainwreck kind of way, making it a fascinating watch.
